LAW AND MOTION, 302, JUDGMENT DEBTOR ARMSTRONG'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED. JUDGMENT DEBTOR HAS NOT CARRIED HER BURDEN OF SHOWING ALL OF HER EARNINGS ARE EXEMPT. (CCP 703.580.) $25 IS ORDERED TO BE WITHHELD FROM DEBTOR'S EARNINGS PER PAY PERIOD UNTIL THE DEBT IS SATISFIED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 (302)

A WRITTEN ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976. (D302)

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jul-12-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Defendant/claimant, Kim D. Armstrong (415-641-1183), appears In Propria Persona

No other appearance is made in this matter

Court hears from defendant, Ms. Armstrong and rules as follows:

DEFENDANT KIM D. ARMSTRONG'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is GRANTED. The levying officer is directed to release any funds held to the judgment debtor. A written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (D302)

Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Nov-25-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - KIM ARMSTRONG, TEL. NO. 641-1183, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Judgment Debtor Armstrong's claim of exemption is denied. Judgment Debtor has not carried her burden of showing all of her earnings are exempt. (CCP 703.580.) $25 is ordered to be withheld from Debtor's earnings per pay period until the debt is satisfied. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/ehg
